tickets.title: Supplier upload failed — CSV rejected at row 842

tickets.title: Login issue — SSO redirect loop for vendor acme

tickets.title: Missing SKU status after nightly syndication
tickets.description: Several SKUs show blank status in portal while ERP shows active. Syndication job 4412 may be partial.

tickets.description: Metrics show backlog growing; no failures in worker logs yet.

tickets.title: Dashboard statistics mismatch vs BI export
tickets.description: Portal tile shows 12% higher upload success than warehouse BI for same date range.

tickets.title: Upload retry stuck in processing
tickets.description: Job uj_8891 has been processing for 45 minutes; worker heartbeat OK.

tickets.title: Documented workaround for UTF-8 BOM in supplier CSV
tickets.description: KB draft: strip BOM before upload or use template v3.

tickets.title: Feature request: bulk download error report
tickets.description: Suppliers want XLSX of failed rows after upload.
